verses.text: Let prayers be made 'for all men; For kings,' that we lead 'a quiet and peaceable life.' Pray for all. Even rulers are to be borne up in prayer.
Let prayers be made 'for all men; For kings,' that we lead 'a quiet and peaceable life.' Pray for all. Even rulers are to be borne up in prayer.
Let prayers be made 'for all men; For kings,' that we lead 'a quiet and peaceable life.' Pray for all. Even rulers are to be borne up in prayer.
God 'will have all men to be saved'; 'there is one God, and one mediator... the man Christ Jesus.' One Mediator. Christ alone stands between God and men.
God 'will have all men to be saved'; 'there is one God, and one mediator... the man Christ Jesus.' One Mediator. Christ alone stands between God and men.
God 'will have all men to be saved'; 'there is one God, and one mediator... the man Christ Jesus.' One Mediator. Christ alone stands between God and men.
I am ordained a preacher to the Gentiles; let men pray everywhere, 'lifting up holy hands.' Holy prayer. Worship is to be pure and universal.
I am ordained a preacher to the Gentiles; let men pray everywhere, 'lifting up holy hands.' Holy prayer. Worship is to be pure and universal.
Women adorn themselves with modesty, not costly array, but 'with good works.' Inner adorning. True beauty is in godly deeds.
Women adorn themselves with modesty, not costly array, but 'with good works.' Inner adorning. True beauty is in godly deeds.
Let the woman learn in silence; I suffer not a woman to teach or usurp authority. Order. He sets the order of the church.
Let the woman learn in silence; I suffer not a woman to teach or usurp authority. Order. He sets the order of the church.
Adam was first formed; the woman was deceived; she shall be saved 'in childbearing, if they continue in faith.' Roles and hope. God's order stands, with His promise of grace.
